titles.title: It's a Great Thing To Praise the Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It’s a great thing to praise the Lord It’s a great thing to praise the Lord It’s a great thing to praise the Lord Walking in the light of the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Walk, walk, walk, walk in the light Walk, walk, walk, walk in the light Walk, walk, walk, walk in the light Walking in the light of the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It’s a great thing to love the Lord It’s a great thing to love the Lord It’s a great thing to love the Lord Walking in the light of the Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Walk, walk, walk, walk in the light Walk, walk, walk, walk in the light Walk, walk, walk, walk in the light Walking in the light of the Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It’s a great thing to serve the Lord It’s a great thing to serve the Lord It’s a great thing to serve the Lord Walking in the light of the Lord

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Walk, walk, walk, walk in the light Walk, walk, walk, walk in the light Walk, walk, walk, walk in the light Walking in the light of the Lord
